description.zh: 欧洲最大的选举君主制国家，贵族（szlachta）约占人口10%，享有'黄金自由'权利，通过瑟姆（Sejm）议会治国，任何一位贵族均可行使自由否决权（Liberum Veto）阻止立法。
description.en: Europe's largest elective monarchy, where the szlachta (nobility, ~10% of population) enjoyed 'Golden Liberty', governed through the Sejm parliament, and any single noble could invoke the Liberum Veto to block legislation.
